title: أ - ب - ت - ث
instruction_en: Put a circle around the letter Alif (one of several instructions; this is the recurring 'circle the target letter' task on the teaching cards)

items.activity: teach card / vocab image (lion)
teach card / vocab image (rabbit)
trace letter forms (stroke order, hamza + alif)
teach card words (mouse, with خطأ=X marker, قرأ=read)
cut-out match: image to letter forms (isolated/initial/medial/final)
connect letter (أ) to matching pictures; color the balloons showing letter أ
connect letter to matching word (كأس, أزرق)
circle words containing letter أ (أرنب, موز, فأر, تين, رأس, كأس)
full worksheet: trace, color picture, circle target letter in grid
teach card / vocab image (duck)
teach card / trace; house image
teach card words (bear, grapes عنب, plant نبات, cow بقرة)
image-to-form: بطة (initial بـ), جبل (medial ـبـ), قلب (final ـب)
trace dots over door image; write letter ب correctly
connect the duck to the lake with letter (ب); color the doors showing ب
search for letter ب and color it (stars with ب/أ/ت)
cut-out forms of ب (isolated/initial/medial/final), house image
teach card: duck بطة, egg بيضة; circle ب in letter grid
color letter ب; read short vowels بَ بُ بِ and color balloons
full worksheet: trace, circle boat/items, write ب
teach card words: تين, تفاح, تاج, تمر, تمساح
trace letter ت (crown image)
teach card: تين, مفتاح, زيت, توت
rewrite letter ت with short vowels تَ تُ تِ
stroke-order trace of ت with directional arrows
trace dotted ت rows (حرف التاء)
trace dots; circle letter ت; write ت correctly (girl image)
'all about letter ت' cover card; apple + crocodile to color, write name
cut-out forms of ت (isolated/medial/final), apple image
full worksheet: crocodile + apple, trace, color, circle ت in grid
vocab cards: تاج, تفاح, توت, تلفاز, تمساح
copy and write the letter ت ('in my beautiful handwriting')
worksheet: بنت, كتاب, تفاح; write ت
teach card حرف التاء: تفاحة, تمساح; circle ت in grid
trace letter ث (fox image)
stroke-order trace of ث (3 dots) with arrows
teach card words: ثوم, ثور, ثعلب, ثعبان, ثوب, ثلج
activity on ث: ثعبان, مثلث, ليث, أثاث; trace rows
full worksheet الثاء: snake + fox, trace, circle ث
teach card حرف الثاء: ثور, ثعلب; circle ث in grid
teach card: ثعلب, اثنان, مثلث, أثاث
trace dotted ث rows
cut-out forms of ث (isolated/initial/medial/final), snake image
ث worksheet: مثلث (triangle), ثلج (ice); write ث
connect letter ث to word (مثلث, ثوم, ليث); color words containing ث (حديث, ثمر, باب, ثلج, مثل, تمر)
position card: ثعلب (start), كمثرى (middle), مثلث (end-connected), أثاث (end-separated)
review activity: circle/color faces showing letter ا vs ب (Alif identification)

notes: All 77 images viewed successfully (PNG/JPEG only; no .wdp/.wmf unviewable files). File is a compilation of teaching cards + tracing/activity worksheets for the first four letters in alphabetic order: ا(أ), ب, ت, ث. Many images (m001-m007, m017-m024, m026, m037-m042, m044, m046-m047, m073-m077) are standalone clipart used as vocab illustrations (lion, well, boy, mouse, glass/cup, cow, penguin, polar bear, dog, door, berries, whale, crocodile, tulips, teacher, etc.); several clipart files are duplicated at the end (m073=m001 lion, m074=m017 cow, m075 door, m076-m077 berries). Letter ا is presented as hamza-on-alif (أ) on most teaching cards (vocab أسد/أرنب) but plain alif (ا) appears in identification grids; recorded as 'ا' in letters[] per the canonical letter. m048 is an image-to-form strip showing a 3-dotted (ث-like) letter paired with apple/orange/blackberry pictures whose words start with ت/ب, not ث — likely a layout/clipart mismatch in the source; FLAG FOR MOTHER to confirm intended letter. Short-vowel (harakat) practice appears for ب (بَ بُ بِ) and ت (تَ تُ تِ). Vowel marks on isolated vocab words were not always legible and were normalized to standard spelling. No full sentences present; vocab is single words only. Stroke-order arrow diagrams present for أ, ت, ث (not a clear standalone one for ب beyond the dotted trace). Confidence high for the four target letters and the activity taxonomy; medium on a few individual vowel diacritics and the m048 mismatch.
